title: Github 1395 Workspace Add Pre Work Knowledge Gates To Startu

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Define the pre-work knowledge gate design requested by #1395 so startup and work-shaping can compactly block or constrain blind starts when known sources may change interpretation, proof, work shape, or completion claims.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep this lane to additive task-posture knowledge gate emission, schema support, tests, and package documentation; do not implement broad search, external lookup automation, or default startup reading lists.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Choose the smallest runtime projection, schema fields, tests, and package documentation needed for #1395 to emit compact pre-work gates.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct answer requires connector integrations, source indexing, broad Memory/doc search, or semantic source resolution beyond compact route/gate projection.
canonical_core.next_action: Open the stacked PR for review; merge can close #1395 while #1389 remains open.
proof_expectations: Run Agentic Workspace implement on the full docs/runtime/schema/test/planning changed paths.
Run the AW-selected workspace, lint, contract, maintainer, summary, doctor, and schema-reference validation after closeout.
completion_criteria: A canonical package doc defines pre-work knowledge gate triggers, force levels, gate effects, task posture fields, command integration, closeout/report evidence, fallback behavior, and compact audit rules.
Task posture packets emit compact knowledge gate fields when selected routes can change work shape, proof, allowed actions, or completion claims.
Startup, implement, summary, and report packet schemas document the gate fields, with tests proving #1395 gate emission and tiny payload budget preservation.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. closure_check.why this decision is honest: #1395 requested compact pre-work knowledge gates, and the branch adds the model, runtime task-posture emission, schema fields, references, and focused tests. This closes only #1395; parent epic #1389 remains open.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: docs/package/knowledge-gates.md covers triggers, force levels, gate effects, command integration, task posture fields, closeout/report evidence, fallback behavior, and compact audit rules. Task posture packets now include knowledge_gates, gate_summary, blocked_actions, blocked_claims, and next_allowed_action when gates are selected.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen if review finds a #1395-required trigger source, force level, command integration point, posture field, closeout evidence state, fallback behavior, or compactness rule missing from the design.
